horoscope: Your friendships or networking activities can pull up strong feelings today, dear Aries. When a person fears they can't match the other person's intensity of feeling, they can pull away, so factor this into the equation if you're concerned about how someone feels about you. Working through problems can be cathartic and puts you in a great position for growth. Still, with the Sun in a minor but challenging aspect to Neptune today, the desire to escape can be strong, and you could also be feeling a little overlooked. The ego should be underplayed for now, and this is part of a natural ebb-and-flow cycle. Some confusion or fogginess is possible, so if dealing with facts and figures, be a little more vigilant.

Emotionally, you're pulling up deep feelings about performance, ambitions, and goals today, dear Taurus, with the Moon's alignment with Pluto at the top of your solar chart. You could feel some discomfort with remaining stagnant, and you might enjoy dreaming up practical ways to realize your creative vision. However, frustrations with your progress or performance can be magnified today if you're falling behind on a project, so try to set aside some time to be alone or in an environment with limited distractions. With today's Sun-Neptune minor challenging aspect, you may be experiencing ambiguous feelings or situations, as you could be temporarily revisiting past difficult experiences or dealing with guilt or lost time. Those things you have neglected may reveal themselves now, or they could be catching up with you. You might feel behind, but keep in mind that it will pass. Try to get in touch with what you're escaping or avoiding, or aim to address loose ends so you can move forward.

There is more focus than usual on the past or unresolved matters this time of year for you, dear Gemini, and some days more than others. Today, there can be a tendency to cocoon yourself from difficult situations or to avoid direct contact with certain people. You might simply not be feeling up to coming to conclusions, making strict commitments, or dealing with definitions. In fact, it's not a good day for solid decisions. Friendships can be on the ambiguous side now, too. Try to stay calm and composed if something unexpected crops up. You'll get back on track soon enough. Fortunately, conversations can be gently rousing and even inspiring.

You're willing to put in the extra effort to study a matter further today, dear Cancer, or do a little strategic thinking. Spending quality time researching can be right up your alley now. You're in the background, but there's quite a bit of power in this position! It's not a day for doing the same old things or sticking with entirely familiar methods and attitudes. However, you could experience some ambiguous feelings about a friendship, work, or reputation matter. There may be some misunderstandings, not necessarily because of poor choice of words, but because confidence in your goals may be temporarily short. Aim to work on gaining more self-understanding or to examine what you may be missing.

While you can be in a rather good frame of mind in many ways today, dear Leo, if you're expecting life to follow the rules today, you're likely to deal with disappointment. There can certainly be some fuzziness, and it may not be easy to motivate yourself to get a whole lot done if you succumb to the idea that things should be a certain way. Some situations today can leave you dealing with question marks, but if you let things be in this regard rather than pushing for definitions and solid answers, you'll be far better off. Be a little more vigilant in situations that require extra focus. Otherwise, nurture your imagination. Relationships frequently help us see ourselves a little more clearly, and this is especially the case for you today.

You have a solid grasp on limits with your routines and work today, dear Virgo, which keeps you grounded and productive. You might discover new ways to manage, organize, and improve your everyday affairs. However, if you are feeling discontent with your current social state, this discontent can magnify today. In most ways, you're content to move about independently right now, but you can be preoccupied. Doubts may be setting in about the long term, casting a slightly gloomy veil over your perceptions. Pushing forward on something new right now may lead to a series of frustrations, so aim to be productive in areas you're sure about.

Emotions run deeply today, and memories are especially powerful, dear Libra. Acknowledging and processing complex emotions can be particularly useful now. The need for self-expression is great, and you may gravitate to intense experiences as a result. However, close relationships may be slightly confusing or possibly alienating in spots. If you're receiving confusing signals from a significant other or partner, it may stem from insecurities or uncertainties rather than a full-on issue. Others' behavior can be baffling, and you prefer to know where you stand, but clarity is elusive temporarily. It's not the time to try to pin someone or something down. Get your mind off problems by focusing on something more manageable and predictable.

With family and home today, dear Scorpio, you're more in touch with your feelings and instincts. With these things, you're less concerned about immediate rewards and instant gratification, and more interested in bigger goals that take time, energy, and strategy to realize. But while you tend to focus on the positive today, it may be difficult to completely convince yourself of something in other life departments. You might use this second-guessing as a chance to catch your breath. One-on-one interactions can be confusing, and it's better not to try to define them or label things just now. Chasing answers will only have you running in circles with today's Sun-Neptune challenge.

With work, routine, and chores today, dear Sagittarius, you could find that your motivation and energy are variable. This likely reflects some lack of confidence in what you're currently doing or where you're heading, although it's temporary. Allow yourself to steer a little off course today if you need to get your bearings. Aim to avoid overloading your schedule while moving things around just enough to keep yourself engaged. Don't take a temporary waning of enthusiasm as something very serious, but do consider whether there's something you've been missing, particularly on spiritual and emotional levels, as you may have forgotten to include these needs in your plans. On another level, if there's a mystery to solve, you're on it today. Feeling out new projects and ideas can be rewarding.

The Moon moves out of your sign early today, dear Capricorn, and the pressure to fill your needs of the moment is lifting. Nevertheless, you're ready and willing to change things up if something isn't working for you. You may be able to tap into talents that have been buried or ignored, and this can eventually set you on a new road. Still, you're unlikely to find a straight, direct path to achieving your goals today, and you might even temporarily second-guess the destination. Try to treat these as interesting detours rather than true roadblocks. Imagine, dream, and consider options that you've forgotten about or never considered before.

You tend to do things with more feeling today, dear Aquarius, with the Moon's move into your sign and its alignment with Pluto. If you've been unhappy with yourself, your personal projects, or the image you project recently, these emotions tend to amplify now. However, this state can open up a chance to work through inner conflicts. There can be an escapist in the people around you today, however. Avoid trying to find definitive answers to problems; instead, offer others (and yourself) kind words. You want to feel free to do things on your own, rather than feeling pushed to do them out of duty.

You're looking within for answers today, dear Pisces, with the Moon heading into your privacy sector and meeting Pluto, encouraging introspection. You may be seeking out some level of anonymity now, or you might be working under the radar quite organically. There is a lot to discover and problems to solve, so you'll especially appreciate time to yourself. It's a day for an inner tune-up. Still, there could be some lack of clarity in business, especially in financial affairs, right now, as important details are all too easy to overlook. Try to pace yourself today.
